name: appdirect-mcp
description: Every documented AppDirect marketplace operation in one binary, plus offline sync and billing-reconciliation joins.

appdirect_client_id.title: APPDIRECT_CLIENT_ID
appdirect_client_id.description: Sets APPDIRECT_CLIENT_ID for the AppDirect MCP server.

appdirect_client_secret.title: APPDIRECT_CLIENT_SECRET
appdirect_client_secret.description: Sets APPDIRECT_CLIENT_SECRET for the AppDirect MCP server.

appdirect_oauth_scope.title: APPDIRECT_OAUTH_SCOPE
appdirect_oauth_scope.description: Sets APPDIRECT_OAUTH_SCOPE for the AppDirect MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
